ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the municipality belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the municipality */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the municipality */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_municipalities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the candidate is running for */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the candidate is running in */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the election (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the result belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the candidate received in the municipality */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the result belongs to */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes the candidate received in the municipality */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for election official, 2 for data analyst, 3 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the user accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the election data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the election official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the election official (e.g., county clerk, board of elections) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the election official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the election official */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the official started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the official ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_official_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the official is assigned to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_official_assignments_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_official_assignments_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES election_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the data was exported from */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file */,
  "export_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the change was made to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for creating the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_versions_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
